title: Creative Co-Op Hand Stamped Striped Stoneware Measuring Cups (Set of 4 Sizes/Designs)
description:
About this item
Curved spout for easy pouring of liquids
Each cup has a different color design
Cup size is clearly marked on the inside
Can stack inside of each other
reviews_5s:
I bought these as a gift for my daughter. They're beautiful and functional. I figure she can keep them out on her counter as decoration until she actually needs to use them. So pretty. I would buy similar products if they're also this niceWhen I 1st saw these I thought "oh so fancy" accurate measure and so cute next to my mixer. If something is on the counter......As described! It is so pretty sitting on the countertop, a very functional and usable decoration.We love this little measuring cups. They look very nice, pour well, and add a bit of charm to our kitchen.They are beautiful and beautifully made. My local kitchen store sells these for 4 times what I paid for on prime day. They have a line to measure up to, which is not as practical as the ones you fill up to the top, but it doesn’t bother me. It includes a “1 1/2 cups” cup, but lacks a “1/3 of a cup” cup, so if you need a 1/3 one, this is not the set for you.if you like stoneware you love these. they are all marked and very sturdy.
they pack inside of each other so they do not take up any room in the cupboard
or on the counter.My mom wanted cute liquid measuring cups that were dishwasher-safe and these worked out perfectly!! So glad I got them!I love them and the letter they include about there imperfections are part of their beauty…❤️I absolutely love these measuring cups. They are sturdy, and unlike the glass measuring cups I have, they are easy to pour without liquid running down the cups. They are very easy to read and love the fact that they stack in each other taking up much less room when storing them. Would definitely recommend them.This set is absolutely adorable! They nest perfectly together. Actually a little sturdier than they look online. Buying another set for a friend.
reviews_1s: Unfortunately, I held onto this item that was purchased to be a gift and just realized too late that one piece in the set is cracked.Super cute. Unfortunately it had limited packing in the original box then place in a larger box with one small item so it banged and bumped around. No the marked fragile nor handle with careSuper cute but arrived broken. If you can’t make it through the Amazon delivery system and it cannot make it through the dishwasher on a daily basis and I’m out very cute though.i just reseved it but it is not complete , the cup (1 1/2 cup .... not come to me ) so bad , i will not buy again never !!!Missing the 1/4 cup! My daughter ordered it and just gave it to me as a gift but the return window closed FOUR days ago! Not a complete set.Recieved these as a house warning party gift and one was broken. Ordered another set and the exact same cup was broken
